vehicles.slot: Below media hub in center console storage bin — small access hole
shift: Open center console storage bin lid.
Locate small override hole below the media hub/USB ports.
Press and hold the brake shift interlock override button in that hole with a key or flathead.
While holding, press the N (Neutral) button on the electronic shifter.
Confirm N is displayed. Release override button.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery is under hood on passenger side near windshield base.
Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals (red +, black −).
Once power is restored, use override hole + N button procedure above.
Confirm N before lifting.
vehicles.notes: 4WD Torque on Demand: transfer case must be in 2H before wheel-lift tow.
vehicles.warn: Transfer case to 2H before towing. Flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: 4WD models: transfer case to 2H, then wheel-lift from front (rear drive wheels roll). RWD: lift from front. Flatbed strongly preferred for all configurations.

tc.type: Electronic Torque on Demand (part-time 4WD, push-button on dash)
positions: 4WD High — NOT safe for dry road towing
4WD Low — NEVER tow in this position
steps: Press the 2WD button on the dash. Wait for 2WD indicator lamp.
Confirm all 4WD indicators are OFF before wheel-lift.
IF BATTERY DEAD: Jump battery first to power TC, shift to 2WD, then tow.

towNotes: ELECTRONIC TC requires 12V power. Jump battery first if dead.
If TC cannot be confirmed in 2WD, USE FLATBED.
Very heavy vehicle — confirm tow truck capacity before lifting.

airSuspension.description: Lincoln Air Glide suspension (optional on some trims). Self-leveling. Automatically adjusts under load.
towingNotes: Air suspension self-levels and maintains stance — no special towing procedure required.
Do NOT disable air suspension before loading on flatbed.
If suspension is failed/deflated, notify flatbed operator — vehicle will be lower than normal.

vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic steering lock. Releases with ignition ON. Will lock when ignition is removed — use tow dolly or flatbed to avoid binding.

battery.location: Under hood, passenger side near windshield base
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard red (+) / black (−) terminals

knownIssues.title: Override Button Hidden Below Media Hub
knownIssues.detail: The shift interlock override is NOT at the base of the shifter. It is a small hole BELOW the USB/media hub in the console storage bin. Many operators look at the shifter base and cannot find it. Look inside the bin, below the ports.

vehicles.curbWeight: 4,745–5,673 lbs (RWD to AWD Grand Touring PHEV)
vehicles.gvwr: Not published — check door jamb label
vehicles.slot: Below media hub in center console storage bin — small access hole
shift: Open center console storage bin lid.
Find override hole below the media hub.
Insert key or flathead, press and hold override button.
While holding, press N on the electronic shifter.
Confirm N is displayed.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
12V battery under hood, passenger side.
Connect jump pack. Restore power.
Use override hole + N button above.
PHEV: use 12V auxiliary only — NEVER touch high-voltage system.
vehicles.notes: Grand Touring PHEV: orange HV cables present — 12V auxiliary only for jump.
vehicles.warn: AWD: FLATBED ONLY. PHEV: never touch HV battery.
vehicles.towMethod: AWD: FLATBED ONLY. RWD: lift from front (rear drive wheels roll). PHEV models: FLATBED ONLY regardless of drivetrain.
towNotes: AWD system does not have a neutral for the transfer case — flatbed mandatory.
PHEV Grand Touring: orange HV wiring present. 12V auxiliary jump only.
PHEV is significantly heavier than gas model — verify flatbed capacity.
vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic steering lock. Will engage without ignition power.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals. PHEV: 12V auxiliary only.
battery.warnings: PHEV: NEVER touch HV battery. AWD: flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Small plastic cap near base of gear selector on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate small cap near shifter base. Pry off with flathead.
Insert key, press down on plunger.
Press brake. Move selector to N.
Replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery under hood.
Connect jump pack. Shift normally or use slot.
AWD: flatbed required — do not wheel-lift.
vehicles.notes: Earlier MKX (2007-2015) uses traditional shift slot. 2016+ Nautilus has electronic selector.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear (front drive wheels roll). AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: AWD system has no TC neutral — flatbed required.
FWD: rear lift, front (drive) wheels roll freely.
vehicles.steeringLock: Standard key or electronic steering lock.

vehicles.slot: Below media hub in center console storage bin — same as Navigator
shift: Open center console bin.
Find override hole below media hub.
Press and hold with key/flathead.
Press N button on electronic shifter.
Confirm N displayed.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery under hood.
Connect jump pack. Restore power.
Use override procedure above.
Hybrid: 12V only — never touch IMA/HV battery.
vehicles.notes: Hybrid eCVT equipped trims: 12V auxiliary jump only.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear (front drive wheels roll). AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Hybrid: use 12V auxiliary only for jump. HV battery is orange-cable marked.
FWD models: rear lift only.
vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic steering lock on push-button start models.

vehicles.slot: Small override hole below electronic shifter in center console
shift: Open center console area.
Find override slot near the electronic gear selector base.
Insert key, press plunger.
Press brake. Press N on shifter display.
Confirm N.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Primary battery: under hood. Secondary chassis battery may be in trunk right side behind panel.
Connect jump pack to under-hood terminals first.
Once powered, use override procedure above.
AWD: flatbed required.
vehicles.notes: Some models have secondary battery in trunk. Use under-hood terminals for jumping.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear. AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: Secondary battery may be in trunk — always jump from under-hood terminals.
AWD: flatbed mandatory.

battery.location: Under hood (primary). Possible secondary in trunk right side.
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — use hood terminals, NOT trunk battery for jumping
battery.warnings: Always jump from under-hood terminals. AWD: flatbed only.

vehicles.slot: Below media hub in center console — same override hole as other Lincoln models
shift: Open center console storage bin.
Find override hole below USB/media hub area.
Insert key or flathead, press and hold.
Press N on electronic shifter.
Confirm N displayed.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery under hood (cover snaps off). Secondary access under spare tire in rear.
Pull back red rubber boot on positive terminal to access.
Connect jump pack. Restore power.
Use override procedure above.
AWD: flatbed required.
vehicles.notes: Compact crossover. AWD has no TC neutral — flatbed only for AWD.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from rear (front drive wheels roll). AWD: FLATBED ONLY.
towNotes: AWD: no transfer case neutral — flatbed mandatory.
Compact vehicle — front access can be tight.

battery.location: Under hood (primary). Secondary battery access under spare tire in rear.
battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — red rubber boot on positive terminal

vehicles.slot: Column-mounted shifter — slot on STEERING COLUMN
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
The Town Car uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED gear selector — shift lock slot is on the STEERING COLUMN.
Locate the slot on the column near the selector lever base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the column slot and press firmly.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move the column shifter to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood, driver side near firewall.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: Extremely common fleet/livery/police vehicle. Column shifter — slot on steering column, not console.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. Very common — straightforward procedure.
towNotes: RWD: lift from rear.
Column shifter — very common livery/fleet vehicle for operators.

battery.location: Under hood, driver side near firewall

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (key to Run position — do not start).
Locate the shift lock override: small cap near selector base on center console.
Pry off the plastic cap with your ignition key or a small flathead screwdriver.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: FWD luxury sedan. Column or console shift depending on year.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front.

vehicles.slot: Column-mounted shifter — slot on STEERING COLUMN
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
1st gen Navigator uses a COLUMN-MOUNTED shifter — slot is on the STEERING COLUMN.
Insert key into the column slot and press firmly.
While holding, press brake pedal.
Move column lever to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Battery under the hood, passenger side near firewall. Connect jump pack.
Once powered, press brake and shift normally.
4WD: electronic TC — jump battery first, then shift TC to 2WD before towing.
RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air.
4WD in 2H: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air.
vehicles.notes: 1st gen Navigator — column shifter. Electronic 4WD requires 12V to shift TC.
vehicles.warn: 4WD: TC must be in 2WD before towing. Jump battery first if dead.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD/2WD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air. 4WD: TC to 2H first, then lift from rear.
towNotes: Column shifter — slot on steering column.
RWD: lift from rear. 4WD: TC to 2H.

battery.warnings: 4WD: jump battery first to power TC.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (key to Run position — do not start).
Locate the shift lock override: small cap near selector base on center console.
Pry off the plastic cap with your ignition key or a small flathead screwdriver.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood, driver side.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.notes: RWD personal luxury coupe. Air suspension on all trims.
vehicles.warn: Air suspension: may drop with dead battery. Jump first to normalize.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD: lift from rear — rear (drive) wheels in the air.
towNotes: RWD: lift from rear.
Air suspension: jump battery to normalize before loading.

battery.warnings: Air suspension may drop with dead battery.
